profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sigma Energy Compressindo Tbk, a service company, provides equipment rental services for the monetization of oil and gas industry. The company is involved in the rental of GasJack mini compressors, and trading of fuel products. It also offers gas booster, gas flaring, gas injection, pumping gas lock, low pressure well, paraffinic well, and compressor products and services, as well as compact and modular systems for confined or remote locations. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Sigma Energy Compressindo Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Sigma Energy Utama.
